name: Pasta with Broccoli Rabe
recipeIngredient: 1 large bunch broccoli rabe, trimmed (small, green flowerettes)
8 ounces small tubular pasta or spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the broccoli rabe in lightly salted water until just tender. Drain well.
2. Squeeze excess water out by hand.
3. In a large frying pan, melt the butter in the olive oil and sauté garlic for 1-2 minutes.
4. Coarsely chop the broccoli rabe and add it to the pan. Sauté about 5 minutes.
5. Add salt and pepper to taste (I like a lot of freshly ground pepper).
6. Add the cooked hot pasta to the pan and toss well.
7. Pour into serving dish and top with grated cheese.
8. Serve hot.
